steps: Beat 2 eggs in a bowl
Chop onion, tomato and green chilli finely
Mix all vegetables into the eggs with salt
Heat oil in pan and pour the mixture
Cook both sides for 2 minutes each
Apply butter on both sides of bread
Place on hot pan
Toast each side for 1 minute
Sprinkle salt and serve
Wash poha in water and drain it
Heat oil in pan and add mustard seeds
Add curry leaves and chopped onion
Add chopped potato and cook for 5 minutes
Add turmeric and salt
Add washed poha and mix gently
Squeeze lemon on top and serve
Dry roast suji until light golden and keep aside
Heat oil and add mustard seeds
Add curry leaves, green chilli and ginger
Add onion and saute until soft
Add water and salt and bring to boil
Slowly add roasted suji stirring continuously
Cover and cook for 3 minutes and serve hot
Wash and pressure cook toor dal with turmeric and salt
Heat ghee in pan and add cumin seeds
Add garlic and saute until golden
Add onion and cook until brown
Add tomato and cook until soft
Add red chilli powder and mix well
Pour tadka over cooked dal and garnish with coriander
Boil potatoes and peel them
Cut potatoes into cubes
Heat oil and add cumin seeds
Add onion and cook until golden
Add tomato and all spices
Add potato cubes and mix well
Cook for 5 minutes and garnish with coriander
Crumble paneer into small pieces
Heat oil and add chopped onion
Add ginger and green chilli
Add tomato and cook until soft
Add turmeric and red chilli powder
Add crumbled paneer and mix well
Cook for 3 minutes and garnish with coriander
Boil water with ginger and cardamom
Add tea leaves and boil for 2 minutes
Add milk and sugar
Add cinnamon and boil for 3 more minutes
Strain and serve hot
Soak rajma overnight and pressure cook
Heat oil and add cumin seeds
Add ginger garlic paste and saute
Add onion and cook until golden
Add tomato and all spices
Add cooked rajma and mix well
Cook for 15 minutes and serve with rice
Soak chickpeas overnight and pressure cook
Heat oil and add onion
Add ginger garlic paste and cook
Add tomato and chole masala
Add cooked chickpeas and mix
Cook for 10 minutes on low flame
Garnish with coriander and serve
Wash and soak rice for 20 minutes
Heat ghee in pan and add cumin seeds
Add bay leaf and let it splutter
Add soaked rice and mix gently
Add water and salt
Cover and cook on low flame for 15 minutes
Fluff with fork and serve
Blanch spinach in hot water and blend smooth
Heat oil and saute onion until golden
Add ginger garlic paste and cook
Add tomato and garam masala
Add spinach puree and mix well
Add paneer cubes and cook for 5 minutes
Add cream on top and serve
Pour idli batter into idli moulds
Steam for 10 minutes and remove
Cook toor dal with turmeric until soft
Heat oil add mustard seeds and curry leaves
Add onion tomato and sambar powder
Add tamarind water and cooked dal
Boil for 10 minutes and serve with idli
Boil and mash potatoes
Mix mashed potato with onion green chilli cumin and salt
Make dough with wheat flour and water
Roll dough into circle and fill with potato mixture
Seal edges and roll again gently
Cook on hot tawa with ghee both sides
Serve hot with curd and pickle
Wash and dry bhindi completely
Cut bhindi into small pieces
Heat oil and fry bhindi until crisp
Remove bhindi and add cumin seeds
Add onion and cook until golden
Add tomato and spices and cook
Add fried bhindi mix well and serve
Heat oil and saute onion until golden
Add ginger garlic paste and cook
Add tomato and garam masala
Add peas and cook for 5 minutes
Add paneer cubes and mix gently
Add cream and cook for 3 minutes
Garnish with coriander and serve
Make stiff dough with flour and water
Boil and mash potatoes with peas
Mix filling with spices cumin coriander
Roll dough into oval shapes
Fill with potato mixture and seal edges
Deep fry in hot oil until golden brown
Serve hot with chutney
Wash rice and dal together
Heat ghee and add cumin seeds
Add ginger and saute
Add rice and dal and mix
Add water turmeric and salt
Pressure cook for 3 whistles
Serve hot with ghee on top
Mix suji rice flour and maida together
Add water to make thin batter
Add onion green chilli cumin and curry leaves
Rest batter for 20 minutes
Heat tawa and pour batter in circular motion
Drizzle oil on edges and cook until crisp
Serve with coconut chutney and sambar
Boil and mash all vegetables together
Heat butter and saute onion
Add tomato and pav bhaji masala
Add mashed vegetables and mix well
Cook on low flame for 10 minutes
Toast pav with butter on tawa
Serve bhaji with pav and chopped onion
Mix besan and curd with water to make kadhi
Cook kadhi on low flame for 20 minutes
Make pakoda batter with besan onion and spices
Deep fry pakodas until golden
Heat oil add mustard seeds and curry leaves
Add tadka to kadhi and mix
Add pakodas and serve with rice
Wash and soak rice for 20 minutes
Heat ghee and add whole spices
Add onion and cook until golden
Add mixed vegetables and saute
Add soaked rice and mix gently
Add water and salt and bring to boil
Cover and cook on low flame for 15 minutes
